quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.CfnAb:
The control of a filter that is used to interact with a dashboard or an analysis.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.DateT.Description: A control from a date filter that is used to specify date and time.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.Dropd.Description: A control to display a dropdown list with buttons that are used to select a single value.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.List.Description: A control to display a list of buttons or boxes. This is used to select either a single value or multiple values.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.Relat.Description: A control from a date filter that is used to specify the relative date.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.Slide.Description: A control to display a horizontal toggle bar. This is used to change a value by sliding the toggle.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.TextA.Description: A control to display a text box that is used to enter multiple entries.

quicksight.dashboard.filtercontrol.TextF.Description: A control to display a text box that is used to enter a single entry.
